Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Andrea Simoncini. Author, maintainer.

  • Michele Bertoncini. Author.

  • Andrea Cerofolini. Author.

  • Andrea Dalpasso. Author.

  • Mattia Falaschi. Author.

  • Gentile Francesco Ficetola. Author.

  • Elia Lo Parrino. Author.

Citation

Simoncini, A., Bertoncini, M., Cerofolini, A., Dalpasso, A., Ficetola, G.F., Falaschi, M., & Lo Parrino, E. (2025). 'envar': an R package to streamline the retrieval and processing of environmental variables for macroecology and biogeography. Ecography, submitted.

@Article{,
  title = {'envar': an R package to streamline the retrieval and processing of environmental variables for macroecology and biogeography},
  author = {Andrea Simoncini and Michele Bertoncini and Andrea Cerofolini and Andrea Dalpasso and Gentile Francesco Ficetola and Mattia Falaschi and Elia {Lo Parrino}},
  journal = {Ecography},
  year = {submitted},
}

On this page

Developed by Andrea Simoncini, Michele Bertoncini, Andrea Cerofolini, Andrea Dalpasso, Mattia Falaschi, Gentile Francesco Ficetola, Elia Lo Parrino.
